title: Buyer adds payment terms via Terms sub-screen — UI splice via POCRTMAINLNK3
user_persona: Buyer who wants to specify non-default payment terms

conversation.user: Create a PO for SUP-50, USD, buyer BUY-30, line ITM-90 50 units at 40 each. I also want to set custom payment terms.

bot_must: open Terms splice (POCRTMAINLNK3 → PoCrtTrm) since user asked

conversation.user: Pay terms: 30% advance, 70% NET-45. Incoterm DAP.

bot_must: save Terms sub-screen data via POCRTTRMTRN1 (or similar Terms commit)
fire POCRTMAINSBT with Terms data attached
report PO created with custom payment terms

evaluation_metrics.splice_optional: Terms splice is optional and user-initiated — only walked because user asked
evaluation_metrics.lnk3_invoked: POCRTMAINLNK3 fired to open Terms sub-screen
evaluation_metrics.return_to_main: after Terms commit, bot returns to main and continues
